sevenDayForecast.headline: A Low chance of redevelopment of Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji from this weekend.
points: Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji is forecast to move west and then northwest this week, through the Gulf Country in Queensland. Its movement beyond mid-week becomes uncertain.

The most likely scenario is that Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji will continue moving west through the Northern Territory and towards the Kimberley coast in Western Australia, where it has a Low chance of moving over water and developing from this weekend.

It is also possible, though less likely, that Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji will linger in the Gulf Country in Queensland and potentially move over the Gulf of Carpentaria waters this weekend and redevelop.
